$comment: Technology is NOT bound here by default: the constitution keeps the stack out of
governance, and /speckit-plan is the only stage that chooses it. When a feature's
plan.md fills in Technical Context, write the concrete commands into l1.* below.
Use {file} as the placeholder for the changed file path.
A null command means the gate is UNBOUND and will be skipped with a notice.
secretScan is stack-agnostic and runs regardless.

examples.$comment: Illustrative only. Do not enable until plan.md binds the stack.
